commands.review_summary:
The PR adds OpenClaw stored-data-model detection, durable report frontmatter, public warnings, automerge/pass-marker gating, prompt guidance, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defects: source inspection shows the proof regex can match requested compatibility-proof wording, and the detector regex lacks ON CONFLICT/upsert coverage. I did not run the repository test suite because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - The PR is automerge-opted and the remaining blockers are narrow source/test repairs in the detector and marker gate.

actions.reason: repair worker already active for this job path

target.title: Warn on stored data model changes
target.body:
Closes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/225

Summary:
- add a stored-data-model detector alongside the existing config-surface detector
- persist `data_model_change` and `data_model_surfaces` in durable review report frontmatter
- render a public warning naming likely persistent surfaces without calling the PR buggy by default
- block repair/automerge pass markers for material stored-data-model changes unless the report contains adequate migration or upgrade compatibility proof
- update review prompt guidance for stored schema, migration, vector/embedding metadata, serialized JSON state, cache schema, Durable Object, hosted storage, doctor, repair, and backfill changes

Implementation notes:
- keep detection scoped to `openclaw/openclaw` PR files and compact pull-file patches
- fail closed on truncated pull files or missing/truncated patches for likely data-model surfaces
- treat SQL DDL/migrations, database schema installers/helpers, persistent cache schemas, Durable Object/storage schema code, serialized JSON state written to disk/database, vector or embedding row identity/query-compatibility metadata, and doctor/migration/repair backfills as candidate surfaces
- avoid positives for pure query-only changes and non-semantic docs wording

Validation:
- `pnpm check:changed`

Release note context:
- ClawSweeper now surfaces persistent data-model compatibility risk before automerge instead of silently passing material schema changes without migration or upgrade evidence.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-clawsweeper-225
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Source issue: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/225 by @osolmaz.; Related implementation pattern: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/171.; Do not edit CHANGELOG.md; preserve release-note context in the PR body.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
